GCCF & FIFe Registered · Dundee, Scotland

Pure breed.
Champion blood.

Catharos — Greek for "pure" — is a home-raised cattery producing pedigree Russian Blue kittens, GCCF & FIFe registered from champion bloodlines. Every kitten leaves microchipped, fully vaccinated, flea & worm treated, and health-checked twice by a vet before going to their new home. Our last litter of four boys has now been fully rehomed — future litters will be announced here first.

See Our Last Litter
Our Story

Raised at home, with a family of three children

Our kittens are born and raised inside our family home in Dundee, underfoot from day one — handled daily by adults and children alike, so each kitten leaves calm, confident, and well socialised.

The mother lives with us full-time; the father lives with another family member and is happy to be viewed by appointment. Both parents are GCCF and FIFe registered and come from champion bloodlines.

Beyond our resident queen, our home includes three other adult cats, so kittens grow up confidently around other cats as well as people and children.

Four boys, all now home

Catharos Russian Blues
The Breed

Why families choose the Russian Blue

A quietly elegant breed with a reputation for being one of the calmest and most loyal companion cats.

Coat

Dense double coat

A short, plush, silvery-blue double coat that stands out from the body — soft to the touch and famously low-shedding.

Temperament

Gentle & devoted

Reserved with strangers but deeply bonded to their family, Russian Blues are known for their quiet, undemanding affection.

Eyes

Vivid emerald green

Kittens' eyes deepen from blue to a striking emerald green by around four months old.

Household

Easy-going companions

Intelligent, tidy, and generally reserved with noise — a wonderful fit for calm households and first-time pedigree owners alike.

Peace Of Mind

Why buyers trust this litter

ID verified breeder, on Pets4Homes since 2021, with a track record of responding to enquiries within six hours.

Verified Breeder Profile

Kittens are raised inside a family home alongside three children — well handled, litter trained, and scratch-post trained.

Home-Reared Litter

Both parents are GCCF & FIFe registered from champion bloodlines. Upon request, an in-person viewing of both parents can be arranged for extra reassurance before you commit.

Champion Bloodline Parents
